This Account details the miniaturization of synthetic chemistry culminating in ultrahigh- throughput experimentation (ultraHTE), wherein reactions are run in 1 L droplets inside of 1536-well microtiter plates to minimize the use of starting materials while maximizing the output…

evidence_chunks.text: Ultrahigh-Throughput Experimentation for Information-Rich Chemical Synthesis Published as part of the Accounts of Chemical Research special issue Data Science Meets Chemistry . Babak Mahjour, Yuning Shen, and Tim Cernak*
Cite This: Acc. Chem. Res. 2021, 54, 2337 2346 Read Online See https://pubs.acs.org/sharingguidelines for options on how to legitimately share published articles.
ACCESS Metrics & More Article Recommendations Downloaded via UNIV OF MICHIGAN ANN ARBOR on March 26, 2026 at 17:51:32 (UTC).

CONSPECTUS: The incorporation of data science is revolutio- nizing organic chemistry. It is becoming increasingly possible to predict reaction outcomes with accuracy, computationally plan new retrosynthetic routes to complex molecules, and design molecules with sophisticated functions. Critical to these develop- ments has been statistical analysis of reaction data, for instance with machine learning, yet there is very little reaction data available upon which to build models. Reaction data can be mined from the literature, but experimental data tends to be reported in a text format that is di cult for computers to read. Compounding the issue, literature data are heavily biased toward productive reactions, and few negative reaction data points are re…

Figure 1. (a) HTE was used to develop reaction conditions for a key SNAr coupling. (b) A rst survey of four solvents and six bases revealed several productive conditions for the coupling of 1 and 2 to form 3. Among the best conditions from this screen, the use of NaHCO3 in NMP was revealed as the most robust set of conditions through subsequent parallel synthesis studies (not shown). (c) Registration of compounds with the 2- aminopyridine motif on the DGAT1 program accelerated after the day that the screen was run (red line). (d) The availability of these reaction conditions enabled hit expansion on a series of DGAT1 inhibitors, culminating in key compounds such as 3 7.
